channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.5.1
item.description:
• Storage now lists Recently Deleted separately, so "Saved recordings" reflects only the recordings you are keeping.
  • Clearer feedback in History: the copy, reveal, and delete buttons highlight when clicked, and Copy shows a checkmark when it is done.
